title: More Tools!
description: Adds new tools to Minecraft, taking advantage of the items components system.
body:
# More Tools!

This Datapack add new tools to Minecraft using the items components system.  
You'll need the Resource Pack to see the textures.

I originally made this Data Pack to resolve the issue of having too much Copper that my friends kept mining, but Iron was scarce, so I made this Data Pack to be able to make Copper Tools to economize on Iron

_**Note 1: it's subject to changes in the future**_  
_**Note 2: always check the [version's page](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-tools!/versions) to download the required resource pack**_

What it adds:
- Copper Tools
- Amethyst Tools
- Emerald Tools
- Obsidian Tools
- Nether Star Tools

![Emerald Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3d37fcf9b3ccfc6f288199a3769f98473dcf13f.png)

![Amethyst Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/044b8ec3dfcc7c845c421f7fccf9d1e20b363fcc.png)

![Copper Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a82d163438332477063bc0fa8670bb29d870c220.png)

![Obsidian Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ced583264228e6dc6f96ed0a73b4787ade5d70f2.png)
